page: Vultr vcg-h100-216c-1914gb-640vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server featuring an x86_64 architecture powered by Intel processors. The system is configured with 216 physical cores and 216 vCPUs with a shared CPU allocation. It is equipped with 1884.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 8.72 GB of RAM per core.

This server integrates eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 640 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of 13312 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, offering high-speed local data access. Additionally, the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the high density of GPU accelerators and massive system memory, this server is designed for intensive workloads such as large language model training, deep learning, high-performance computing, and large-scale data science tasks. The combination of 13312 GB NVMe storage and 1884.0 GB RAM supports complex data pipelines and massive datasets. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the consolidation of eight enterprise-grade H100 GPUs and extensive memory into a single bare-metal instance reduces the overhead of multi-node cluster management for demanding AI workloads.
description: Vultr vcg-h100-216c-1914gb-640vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server built on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors. It features 216 physical cores and 216 vCPUs alongside 1884.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.72 GB of RAM per core. The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs, providing a total of 640 GB of high-bandwidth VRAM. For local storage, the server is equipped with 13312 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. This hardware profile is engineered for highly demanding computational tasks, including large-scale artificial intelligence model training, deep learning, and complex data science operations. The massive local NVMe storage and extensive memory footprint allow for efficient processing of large datasets without relying on external network storage.

tagline: A high-density bare-metal GPU platform featuring eight NVIDIA H100 accelerators, 1884 GB RAM, and 13.3 TB of local NVMe storage.
